name: Week 8 KB Conditioning (Refine -- Light)
description: Thursday = light skill drilling. Same as W7. 20 min, no leg loading. OTD flow at 20lb 2x2, bent press 20-25, windmill 18-20, TGU 25. NO swings, NO C&P, NO squats. Legs tomorrow.

sets.name: OTD Flow (Light)
sets.notes: 20lb. 2 reps each side x 2 rounds. Should feel effortless.

exercises.notes: 20-25lb. Groove, not grind. W7 at 25 was clean — stay light here, Tuesday is the work day.
18-20lb. Light. Deep hinge. Hip flexor stretch.
25lb. Lighter intent than Tuesday. Drill transitions on left side — that's still the weak link.

tips: No swings, no C&P, no goblet squats, no lunges. Zero leg loading.
This is skill maintenance -- keep the movement patterns fresh without any fatigue.
Same as W7 — if it's not broken, don't fix it.
Be boring. Boring is the goal. Your legs will thank you.
